action.content: Write a funny, 150+ word ad for an attorney who helps poor people with their divorces. Highlight at least 3 text sections by italicize them with markdown (i.e. *highlighted section*).
action.label: context

action.content:
Tired of paying hefty fees to lawyers who only help the rich? Meet our friendly, down-to-earth attorney who's dedicated to helping poor people navigate the divorce process with compassion and care. We believe in treating every client like family, no matter their financial situation. Whether you're going through a hard time or just need some guidance, our team is here to help you get the support you need.

*Our team is committed to providing affordable legal services to all clients, regardless of their financial status.*

We've helped countless individuals and families find peace and resolution through our empathetic approach, and we're excited to help you too. No matter what your situation is, we'll work tirelessly to ensure you get the best possible outcome. So, don't let financial constraints hold you back from getting the help you deserve. Contact us today and let's get to work on getting you the support you need.

*We offer a range of affordable options, including a free initial consultation to discuss your case and determine if we're a good fit for you.*
action.label: response
